level_labels_as_printed.label: ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง
ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง

elements.description: Ø2"AVC (ต่อออกนอกอาคาร) -- left stack vent pipe with cap, terminates outside the building above the highest labeled level
Ø2"AVC (ต่อออกนอกอาคาร) -- right stack, second identical vent pipe with cap, parallel to the left one
Ø4"S soil pipe on the left stack, entering horizontally at the +3.75 level, turning down into the vertical run
Ø4"S soil pipe on the right stack, entering horizontally at the +3.75 level, turning down into the vertical run -- mirrors the left stack
Ø21/2"W vertical waste pipe on the left stack, running down from the +3.75 level connection
Ø21/2"W vertical waste pipe on the right stack, running down from the +3.75 level connection
Ø2"V dashed vertical vent line on the left stack, running down past the +3.75 level parallel to the Ø4"S/Ø21/2"W lines
Ø2"V dashed vertical vent line on the right stack, running down past the +3.75 level, parallel to the left one
Ø4"SW vertical stack on the left system, running from the +3.75/+0.60 connection down to the septic tank inlet at the bottom
Ø4"SW vertical stack on the right system, running down to the +0.60/+0.00 area and joining the same combined discharge run toward the septic tank

small valve/fitting glyph (⊣⊢-style mark) on the left stack's vertical pipe just below where the Ø4"S horizontal branch turns down near the +3.75 level -- exact type not separately labeled with text on the sheet
matching valve/fitting glyph on the right stack's vertical pipe at the same relative position as the left stack's -- exact type not separately labeled with text
Ø3/4"CW dash-dot vertical riser on the left stack, running up from the bottom horizontal Ø3/4"CW main past the +0.60 level
Ø3/4"CW dash-dot vertical riser on the right stack, running up from the bottom horizontal Ø3/4"CW main past the +0.60 level toward the water storage tank

ถังเก็บน้ำสำเร็จรูปแสตนเลส ขนาดจุ 1 ลบ.ม. มาตรฐาน มอก.989 พร้อมขาตั้งครบชุด วางบนพื้นคอนกรีตเสริมเหล็กหนา 0.10ม. เสริมเหล็ก Ø9มม. @0.20ม. -- stainless prefab water storage tank, 1 cu.m., on its own reinforced concrete pad
FLOAT VALVE Ø1/2" at the top inlet of the water storage tank
BALL VALVE Ø1/2" adjacent to the float valve at the tank top
Ø3/4" BY PASS branch with a valve symbol, feeding around/into the booster pump line

เครื่องสูบน้ำเพิ่มแรงดัน (BOOSTER PUMP, labeled BP.) ชนิดอัตโนมัติ ขนาดไม่น้อยกว่า 200 วัตต์ อัตราการสูบน้ำไม่น้อยกว่า 28 ลิตร/นาที ที่ความสูง 12 เมตร ผลิตภัณฑ์ MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJKCA หรือเทียบเท่า
ชุดมาตรวัดน้ำ Ø1/2" ( ค่าใช้จ่ายในการติดตั้งเป็นของผู้รับจ้างทั้งสิ้น ), positioned on the Ø3/4"CW line at the far right, downstream of 2 hose-bib/faucet (C.) symbols
2x ก๊อกน้ำ (C.) symbols on the Ø3/4"CW branch line near the water meter

ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูปชนิดเกรอะ-กรองไร้อากาศ (hatched tank symbol at bottom-left): ปริมาตรส่วนเกรอะไม่น้อยกว่า 1.0 ลบ.ม., ปริมาตรส่วนกรอง ไม่น้อยกว่า 0.25 ลบ.ม., ผลิตภัณฑ์ AQUA, PP, DOS, SAN-PAC, HICLEAR หรือเทียบเท่า, การติดตั้งให้เป็นไปตามมาตรฐานผู้ผลิต -- receives the Ø4"SW stacks and discharges via Ø4"SW to the site catch basin (ต่อลงบ่อพักท่อระบายน้ำ)
Ø4"SW outlet arrow labeled 'ต่อลงบ่อพักท่อระบายน้ำ' leading left off the septic tank at the +0.00 level

warnings: This sheet shows two nearly-symmetric riser systems side by side (left stack + right stack) both feeding into the same Ø4"SW discharge run to the septic tank, and a shared water-supply/booster-pump/tank system on the right side of the sheet -- likely representing two separate bathroom stacks (e.g. ground-floor WC and upper-floor WC vertically aligned) rather than one system, consistent with this being a 2-story house. Not cross-confirmed against the floor plans yet (pages 53-54) -- flagged for review once those are read.

LEVEL LABEL: same pattern noted on house #3's equivalent sheet -- 'ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง' (ground-floor level) is printed at BOTH +3.75 and +0.60, which is physically implausible if both are literally 'ground floor'. Unlike house #3's sheet (which mislabeled its lowest level as 'ระดับพื้นชั้นหลังคา'), this page's lowest level is labeled 'ระดับดิน' (ground/soil level) which is internally consistent. Transcribed literally as printed; the '+3.75 ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง' label likely should read something like 'ระดับพื้นชั้นบน' (upper floor) based on the same reasoning applied to house #3 (a floor at +3.75 is far too high to be ground floor) -- to be cross-confirmed once the upper-floor sanitary plan (expected around page54) is read.

The two ⊣⊢-style glyphs near the +3.75 level on each stack's vertical pipe are not separately labeled with text on the sheet -- described by position/appearance only, flagged for zoom-review, same treatment as the analogous unlabeled valve pair on house #3's equivalent page.

Booster pump brand list reads 'FUJKCA' on this sheet's text block (vs. 'FUJIKA' transcribed on house #3's equivalent sheet) -- transcribed exactly as printed here, not harmonized; could be an OCR/print-quality artifact of the same brand name rather than a genuine difference, not independently verifiable at this resolution.

Water tank, booster pump, and septic tank equipment-spec text blocks are clearly legible, transcribed in full with high confidence. This equipment_specs boilerplate matches the same text seen on house #3's page49 riser diagram and page50 floor plan.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true here -- this is a schematic vertical diagram, not on the building's structural plan grid.
